title: I was in the darkness by Stephen Crane
content:
I was in the darkness;
I could not see my words
Nor the wishes of my heart.
Then suddenly there was a great light --

"Let me into the darkness again.

title: There was a man who lived a life of fire by Stephen Crane
content:
There was a man who lived a life of fire.
Even upon the fabric of time,
Where purple becomes orange
And orange purple,
This life glowed,
A dire red st

title: In a lonely place, by Stephen Crane
content:
In a lonely place,
I encountered a sage
Who sat, all still,
Regarding a newspaper.
He accosted me:
"Sir, what is this?"
Then I saw that I was greater,

title: Once I saw mountains angry by Stephen Crane
content:
Once I saw mountains angry,
And ranged in battle-front.
Against them stood a little man;
Aye, he was no bigger than my finger.
I laughed, and spoke to

title: In heaven by Stephen Crane
content:
In heaven,
Some little blades of grass
Stood before God.
"What did you do?"
Then all save one of the little blades
Began eagerly to relate
The merits

title: Man, The
content:
A man said to the universe,
    "Sir, I exist!"
